positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    location(picuris,texas)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~location(picuris,new_mexico)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    texas != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    new_mexico != juan).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    picuris != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    new_mexico != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    picuris != texas).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    mountain_range(picuris)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    picuris != juan).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    juan != harding_pegmatite).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    visited(juan,picuris)).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    ~visited(juan,X0) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~location(X0,new_mexico)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    picuris != new_mexico).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    texas != juan).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define donated(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define located_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mine(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define false := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
